items.hook: Bad Bunny concert in Milan abandoned because of hailstorm
items.body:
Fans evacuated from sold-out open-air show as organisers promise full refunds

An open-air show by the Puerto Rican music star Bad Bunny was abandoned in Italy on Saturday night because of a violent hailstorm, but the organiser said

items.hook: Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts
items.body: After an eight-year absence from UK stages, Bruno Mars returned to Wembley Stadium with a polished, hit-filled show.

items.hook: Russian Social-Democratic Union of Youth is a Russian non-governmental organization founded in December 2000 with the support of Mikhail Gorbachev as a youth branch of the Russian United Social Democratic Party.
items.body: It became a member of the International Union of Socialist Youth in 2004. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Ludwig Schnorr von Carolsfeld was a German heldentenor.
items.body: The son of painter Julius Schnorr von Carolsfeld, he was trained as a vocalist at the Kreuzschule in Dresden and the Leipzig Conservatory. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Nielsen is a lunar impact crater on the Oceanus Procellarum.
items.body: It is located north-east of Montes Agricola on the western hemisphere of the Moon. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: “He had a big impact on the history of film in this country”: Industry pays tribute to Simon Field who has died aged 80
items.body: “Simon never gave up, never compromised,” said Apichatpong Weerasethakul of his ‘Uncle Boomee’ producer.

items.hook: Yr Arloeswr was a Welsh-language literary magazine published between 1957 and 1960.
items.body: Gerallt Jones and Bedwyr Lewis Jones, and contained short stories, poems, and book reviews, and sometimes works of art. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Judge orders pause on Paramount-Warner merger after challenge from 12 states
items.body:
